ment will be in a Royal Court. Unfor Dh. Jupt. Mars
tunately the Sun has no planets in the
12th and 2nd to his place in Gemini. Hence, the native will not make any
headway in his profession; but will plod on (Saturn in 5th to Jupiter). The
native will. however, gain considerably when Saturn in his second round
between 38-40 will come to his help when he contacts Venus who has Mars in
the 2nd to him with the nodical Satums' aspect from seventh. He will then
acquire considerable influence in Royal circles. When Saturn comes to
Capricorn and Aquarius, aspect from the Moon makes the native have a
change of place and he will come home even while he carries on his trading
business. Further, Jupiter at birth was retrograde and so he was born in one
